text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Trainer, you can't go around looking like a
slob just 'cause you're tired!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
At times like these, it's best to move around and
get your blood flowing again! Tell you what, I'll
go out for a long run with you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
We'll go after that cloud over there—wherever it
takes us!
